<!--
Thanks for your Pull Request! Fill in the sections below — keep it concise.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] test — added or refactored tests
- [ ] ci — CI / build tooling
- [ ] chore — housekeeping

## Affected modules

- [ ] `remote-download-core`
- [ ] `remote-download-apache`
- [ ] `remote-download-s3`
- [ ] `remote-download-azure`
- [ ] `remote-download-gcs`
- [ ] `remote-download-sftp`
- [ ] `remote-download-ftp`
- [ ] `remote-download-spring`
- [ ] `remote-download-quarkus`
- [ ] `examples/`
- [ ] root (parent pom, README, CI, ...)

## Checklist

- [ ] `mvn clean install` passes locally
- [ ] Public API additions ship with Javadoc + `@since` tag
- [ ] Conventional Commit format in the PR title (e.g. `feat: add Dropbox origin`)
- [ ] No personal data, secrets, or credentials in code or commit messages
- [ ] If a public API changed, the README was updated
- [ ] If a new module was added, the parent pom and the README *Modules* table were updated

## How to verify

A reviewer should be able to validate the change in under five minutes.
